feedback.text: One major thing somewhat related to this act is that publishers of video games may make the game inaccessible to its buyer; right now, there is no regulation regarding this problem. I believe it is on a very thin line with consumer rights, since they are often not correctly informed regarding that they only own a license to a game. This has been an issue for years now, and it only keeps getting worse. I wish this act to include something related to the problem of video game publishers making a game inaccessible for those who have paid for one. Thank you.
